model.Character

controller

  • Uses of Character in controller

    Methods in controller with parameters of type Character
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    CollisionChecker.checkBomb(Character entity)
    Method to check monster collision with the bombs
    int
    CollisionChecker.checkEntity(Character entity, Character[] target)
    Method to check the collisions between monsters
    int
    CollisionChecker.checkMonster(Character entity, Monster[] target)
    Method to check if the player is colliding with a monster
    int
    CollisionChecker.checkObject(Character entity, boolean player)
    Method to check player collision with the objects, in particular with power-ups and with the exit
    boolean
    CollisionChecker.checkPlayer(Character entity)
    Method to check if a monster is colliding with a player
    void
    CollisionChecker.checkTile(Character entity)
    Main method to check monsters and player collisions with the tiles of the map
